scripts.dev: concurrently -n "hono,next" -c "green,blue" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.kubb:generate: npm run generate:spec --workspace=backend && kubb generate && (trash frontend/node_modules/.vite 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace=backend run typecheck && npm --workspace=frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
